titleStmt.title: SII 9.337: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 337. (A.R. No. 218 of 1918.) ON A BEAM IN THE MALLIKARJUNASVAMI TEMPLE AT KURUVATTI, HARAPANAHALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This undated record refers itself to the reign of the Hoysaḷa king Vīra-Ballāḷa. The Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Gommadēva, expert in śāstra and śastra, and promoter of the glory of the Yādavas, is said to have made a gift of 36 mattars of land to the north of Haṟuhe in Beṇṇeyūru twelve for the service of the god Āhavamallēśvara and placed it in the charge of Lōkābharaṇa. Since this Lōkābharaṇa is also mentioned in a record of Ballāḷa II, the present inscription may belong to that king's reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Ōṁ namaḥ śivāya . jayatyāhavamallēśaḥ . śēkharīkṛtacaṁdramāḥ . yatpādapaṁkajē nitya
mamarairbhbhramarāyitaṁ . svasti śrīmatpratāpacakravartti rāyanārāyaṇa hoysaṇa
vīraballāḷadēvavijayarājyaṁ saluttavire tatpādapadmōpajīvi . svasti samadhigatapaṁcama
hāśabda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ . dvārāvatīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ . nijabhujabaḷōpārjjitavijayala
kṣmīkāṁtaṁ parabaḷakṛtāṁtaṁ Anēkaśastraśāstrapārāvāraparāyaṇaṁ . maṁḍaḷikanārāyaṇa
yādavakuḷakumudinīniśākaraṁ . satyaratnākaraṁ . nīticāṇikyaṁ . Amōghavākyaṁ . śaṁkhacakragadādharaṁ sakaḷa
kaḷādharaṁ . siṁdasiguṇānvayaprasūtaṁ . lōkavikhyātaṁ . caladaṁkarāmaṁ . bhujabaḷabhīmaṁ Asahāyasamarttha
gaṁḍaratīrtthaṁ vīragōmadēvaru śrīmadāhavamallēśvaradēvargge khaṁḍasphuṭitajimrṇnōddhārāṁgabhōgaraṁgabhōga
kke be(ṁ)ṇneyūrppa(ṁ)nneraḍaṟa baḷiya bāḍaṁ . haṟuheyiṁ baḍagalu pāṁḍyadēvana balmanuśya
ru be(ṁ)ṇneyūra caṁḍugidēvanuṁ kāḷagauḍanuṁ . haṟuhegiduttaravenisalkuṟuvattiya dakṣiṇaṁ svapūrvva
mūṁvattaṟu mattaru keṁmogeyaṁ neṟe lōkābharaṇacaraṇabhaktiyoḷittaru . maṁgaḷa śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.337 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
